gap_summaries.description: UnknownEvent.to_dict() missing timestamp and run_id fields in re-serialization (REQ-09 byte-equality violation)
gap_summaries.fix_applied: [post-impl] Updated UnknownEvent.to_dict() to include timestamp and run_id alongside event_type and raw_fields

gap_summaries.description: Weak test assertion in test_unknown_event_byte_equal_reserialize_req09: missing byte-equality check against original_line
gap_summaries.fix_applied: [post-impl] Added self.assertEqual(original_line, reserialized) assertion after first re-serialization

gap_summaries.description: Module docstring does not cite which requirements it fulfills (REQ-02 through REQ-12)
gap_summaries.recommendation: Nice-to-have for maintainability; does not block production readiness

gap_summaries.description: Uncovered branches in _is_optional_type (lines 244-245) and _validate_event_fields (lines 267-286) due to M01 having zero optional fields; reserved for M02+ forward-proofing
gap_summaries.recommendation: Acceptable defensive code for future M02 optional fields; 98% coverage is excellent; can add comment explaining why branches are unreached in M01

recommendations: Module is ready for production deployment
Zero critical or important gaps remaining
Forward-compatibility via UnknownEvent working as designed
Nice-to-have improvements (GAP-P001, GAP-P002) are optional and do not impact functionality
next_steps: Push branch with all Phase C fixes
Proceed to foundation-m01-round-trip-tests milestone (depends on this one)
